description: Plugin-distributed hooks for email-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable email smells — (1) DMARC at p=reject/quarantine with no rua=, (2) an SPF +all, (3) a likely ESP API key/SMTP secret committed in a file, (4) a bulk/marketing HTML email with no List-Unsubscribe. Set EMAIL_ENG_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
